message:
feat(fp-index): add Index.to_list/format/putmask parity (frankenpandas-h4xc)

Three Index helpers that round out the introspection surface:

- to_list() — owned Vec<IndexLabel>; convenience when callers need
  ownership transfer without cloning via labels().
- format() — stringified labels via Display. Matches pd.Index.format()
  / astype(str).tolist() output shape.
- putmask(cond, value) — replace labels at true positions with `value`.
  Shorter `cond` leaves trailing labels unchanged (pandas-style
  lenient alignment); empty cond is a no-op. Name is preserved.

Co-lands frankenpandas-70gw (putmask) and w5vm (format).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
